title: Only Scythe
body:
[**![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/8fd2f0f5-1266-429b-b91c-d015a2026f31.webp)**](https://blocklegend001.dev/bh) **[![Discord Badge](https://img.shields.io/discord/1051116089133777016?color=green&label=Discord&logo=Discord&logoColor=green&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/jVmUTGFMX5)**

This mod adds the Scythe, a new tool designed for fast and efficient harvesting. By right-clicking, the Scythe will harvest and replant fully grown crops in an area based on the tool’s tier. Additionally, right-clicking on grass or dirt will till the land, just like a hoe—making.

The Scythe is a simple but powerful quality-of-life tool with unique mechanics:

--- ### 🌾 Right-Click to Harvest Crops Harvest and automatically replant all **fully grown crops** in a radius determined by the Scythe’s material. Only mature crops are affected. The Scythe also supports **sugar cane**, **cactus**, **kelp**, **bamboo**, and **nether wart**, making it a versatile tool for all types of farming. It is fully compatible with **custom crops** that are properly tagged with Minecraft's built-in `#minecraft:crops`. To prevent accidental destruction, **non-fully grown crops can only be broken while sneaking** (holding **Shift**). ![crop](https://i.imgur.com/r8c7046.gif)
Other Crops (Click to expand) **Cactus** **Sugar Cane** **Cocoa Beans** **Bamboo** **Kelp** **Nether Wart**
--- ### 🍃 Left-Click to Clear Foliage Break grass, flowers, ferns, and similar blocks in a large area instantly. ![foliage](https://i.imgur.com/kMdWkiE.gif) --- ### ⚙️ Additional Features * **Sneaking disables area breaking**: Holding **Shift** while using the Scythe limits its action to a single block — useful for precise work. * **Fortune enchantments** apply to **all broken blocks**, just like with tools in vanilla. * **Configurable**: Every radius is configurable. --- ### 🛠️ Tool Tiers * **Wooden and Stone Scythe** → 3 × 3 area * **Iron and Gold Scythe** → 5 × 5 area * **Diamond Scythe** → 7 × 7 area * **Netherite Scythe** → 9 × 9 area
